@sigil v0 hybrid
V: hdr_override ∧ authz_bypass ∧ spoof(x-user-id) ∧ drop_hdr ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied
A: sess_only

[AUDIT]
Verify: header override and authorization bypass and spoof(x-user-id) and drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Answer target: verified session auth only.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
V: hdr_override ∧ authz_bypass ∧ spoof(x-user-id)
R: !drop_hdr ∧ !keep_401 ∧ !spoof_denied
A: tenantId|"403" ∧ header ∧ auth ∧ risk ∧ verify ∧ drop_hdr ∧ keep_401 ∧ spoof_denied

[AUDIT]
Goal: review(patch).
Verify: header override and authorization bypass and spoof(x-user-id).
Risk: high-risk drop the header path and high-risk keep 401 behavior and high-risk spoofed requests denied.
Answer target: tenantId or "403" and header and auth and risk and verify and drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.

P: spoof(x-role)→keep_401
V: hdr_override∧authz_bypass
R: !sess_only∧!data_tamper
A: drop_hdr

[AUDIT]
Goal: header override and authorization bypass and spoof(x-role) implies drop the header path and keep 401 behavior and spoofed requests denied.
Hypothesis: spoof(x-role) and authorization bypass implies drop the header path.
Plan: spoof(x-role) then keep 401 behavior.
Verify: header override and authorization bypass.
Risk: high-risk verified session auth only and high-risk data_tamper.
Answer target: drop the header path.
